trigger.Name: trHelPlaceSecret
trigger.script:
local gunlist = {"pktu01","pkt01","kord01","vector01","hurricane01","vulcan01","pkt02","browning01"} local len = getn(gunlist)
for i=1,14 do --println("step"..i.."succesful") CreateBoxWithAffixGun(CVector(getPos("SecretPlace"..i.."_loc")), gunlist[random(len)], random(0, 2)) end trigger:Deactivate()
